outreach_draft.subject: Gatekeeper Liability Recovery — Uncollected Fraud Judgment — Bank & Underwriter Exposure
outreach_draft.body:
Dear Mr. Rizio-Hamilton,

I am reaching out regarding a gatekeeper liability recovery matter that may align with Bernstein Litowitz's work in underwriter and financial institution fraud recovery.

Our client holds a substantial uncollected fraud judgment against an offshore foreign corporation. Direct enforcement is not viable. The recovery strategy targets the financial institution and underwriter gatekeepers — entities that were positioned to identify or prevent the fraud and failed to act. The preferred path is negotiated settlement using identified liability exposure as leverage.

Your firm's recovery of $3.3B in the Viacom-Archegos matter, the $150M JPMorgan Chase recovery, and the Wilmington Trust bank fraud conspiracy action reflect exactly the type of financial institution gatekeeper recovery model we are pursuing.

I would welcome a brief preliminary conversation. No commitment implied — happy to share case details under mutual NDA.

Sincerely,
[SENDER_NAME]
Corporate Z | Judgment Monetization Group
